title: anthyllis vulneraria subsp. bulgarica
intro: Anthyllis vulneraria subsp. bulgarica, also known as the kidney vetch or Balkan kidney vetch, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the legume family Fabaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Anthyllis vulneraria subsp. bulgarica include its ability to aid in the healing of skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, and to reduce inflammation and pain. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and respiratory infections.
